rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for stateful equations, const for constants, and assign for output bindings
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for contract expressions
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
generic_rules: Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Delete or rewrite AGREE clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators and implication for contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
